section.title: KTN::CME::IL3::IL3AppHelpers Class Reference

para.para: The IL3AppHelpers class provides helper functions for the IL3 application.

listitem.para: Gets the current time in nanoseconds since the epoch.
Generates an order timestamp in nanoseconds since the epoch.
Generates a fast timestamp using the timestamp counter on x86_64 architecture.

section.title: Detailed Description
section.para: The IL3AppHelpers class provides helper functions for the IL3 application.

section.section:
Member Function Documentation

static uint64_t KTN::CME::IL3::IL3AppHelpers::GenFastTimestamp ( )[inline], [static]
Generates a fast timestamp using the timestamp counter on x86_64 architecture.
Returns
The generated fast timestamp.

static uint64_t KTN::CME::IL3::IL3AppHelpers::GenOrdTimestamp ( )[inline], [static]
Generates an order timestamp in nanoseconds since the epoch.
Returns
The generated order timestamp.
GetNanosecondsSinceEpochOptimized() GetNanosecondsSinceEpochOptimizedKTN::CME::IL3::IL3AppHelpers KTN::CME::IL3::IL3AppHelpersGetNanosecondsSinceEpochOptimized
uint64_t KTN::CME::IL3::IL3AppHelpers::GetNanosecondsSinceEpochOptimized ( )[inline]
Gets the current time in nanoseconds since the epoch.
Returns
The current time in nanoseconds since the epoch.
